basic_details.job_title: CSL Auto Electrician Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Cochin Shipyard Limited (CSL) Auto Electrician Notification 2026 has been released on 30-06-2026 on the official website cochinshipyard.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the CSL Auto Electrician Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years. Age relaxation for OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) is 3 years. Age relaxation for PwBD & Ex-servicemen is as per Govt. guidelines, subject to a maximum of 50 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Pass in SSLC and ITI –NTC (National Trade Certificate) in the trade of Mechanic Auto Electrical & Electronics (MAEE) or Mechanic Motor Vehicle.
qualification.details: Pass in SSLC and ITI –NTC (National Trade Certificate) in the trade of Mechanic Auto Electrical & Electronics (MAEE) or Mechanic Motor Vehicle.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Auto Electrician on contract basis for CSL

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Auto Electrician on contract basis for CSL

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSL Auto Electrician Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CSL Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.text: Pass in SSLC and ITI –NTC (National Trade Certificate) in the trade of Mechanic Auto Electrical & Electronics (MAEE) or Mechanic Motor Vehicle.

CSL Auto Electrician Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years. Age relaxation for OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) is 3 years. Age relaxation for PwBD & Ex-servicemen is as per Govt. guidelines, subject to a maximum of 50 years.

content_sections.heading: CSL Auto Electrician Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
CSL Auto Electrician Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSL Auto Electrician Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSL Auto Electrician recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the CSL Auto Electrician posts is 22nd July 2026. Ensure you complete the application process before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Auto Electrician post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed SSLC and possess an ITI –NTC (National Trade Certificate) in the trade of Mechanic Auto Electrical & Electronics (MAEE) or Mechanic Motor Vehicle.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Auto Electrician position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Auto Electrician post is 45 years. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Auto Electrician post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Auto Electrician post announced by Cochin Shipyard Limited (CSL).

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Auto Electrician role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Auto Electrician post will receive a salary of Rs. 23,300 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for CSL Auto Electrician recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Auto Electrician position at CSL will primarily involve a Practical Test.

faq.question: Q7. Is there an application fee for the CSL Auto Electrician recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of ₹ 300/- for General and OBC category candidates. SC/ST candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the CSL Auto Electrician recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for CSL Auto Electrician recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this Auto Electrician position?
faq.answer: The Auto Electrician position is on a contract basis with Cochin Shipyard Limited (CSL).
